commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds Policy plugin sandbox posture evidence, health checks, agent-scoped sandbox overlay support, tests, and docs for sandbox mode/backend, Docker bind/network/profile, and sandbox browser CDP conformance.

PR surface: Source +1065, Tests +634, Docs +48. Total +1747 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current runtime normalizes backend ids through the sandbox registry, while the PR branches on the raw `effectiveBackend === "docker"` string. A mixed-case Docker backend can therefore be runtime-Docker while Docker posture evidence is skipped by policy.
commands.review_followup: A narrow repair can normalize backend ids in the sandbox posture evidence scanner and add focused regression coverage without choosing a new product direction.

target.title: Policy: add sandbox posture conformance checks
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed
